## What

One or two sentences on what this changes and why.

## Package(s)

- [ ] @dvgl/core
- [ ] @dvgl/frames

- [ ] @dvgl/czml

## Checklist

- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm build`, `pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] No code copied from AGPL or other license-incompatible sources
- [ ] New source files carry the Apache-2.0 header
